studies.title: A RANDOMIZED, UNCONCLUSED, CONTROLLED CLINICAL STUDY TO EVALUATE THE EFFECTIVENESS AND SAFETY OF THE Ecovery APP IN PATIENTS WITH SUBACUTE TO CHRONIC UNSPECIFIC PAIN OF THE LOWER BACK

_verification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions the 'eCovery app,' which matches the product name and description provided. The clinical area and focus on lower back pain align with the product's intended use. Although the abstract and intervention details are not available, the title provides sufficient specificity to confirm relevance.

_classification.reason: The title explicitly mentions 'randomized' and 'controlled clinical study,' which are clear indicators of an RCT design. However, the lack of additional details slightly reduces confidence.
